title: rosa × polliniana var. muscipula
intro: Rosa × polliniana var. muscipula, also known as the "cat's claw rose," is a plant species belonging to the family Rosaceae, characterized by its unique appearance and medicinal properties. The plant's root and stem are used to make herbal preparations due to their rich content of bioactive compounds, including flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Rosa × polliniana var. muscipula is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, capsules, or tinctures, and are often used to support overall health and well-being.
